text:
Hunter × Hunter Arena Battle (アリーナバトル, Hantā × Hantā Arīna Batoru) is a mobile strategy card battle RPG game based on the 2011 anime adaptation of Hunter × Hunter.

Card Overview

Support cards are among the three card types used in Arena Battle; the others are character cards and action cards. Cards are obtained through the Gacha. Unlike action or character cards, support cards cannot be generated. When obtained, the cards are at level 1 (initial level) and can be leveled up 5 times to reach the maximum level.

There are over 70 support cards, and they are ranked depending on their value. From lowest to highest, these ranks are A, S, and SS. You are allowed to equip up to three support cards per deck. These cards vary in activation requirements and abilities but do not fall under any of the eight card groups.
